content.en:
Wow!!!!!

The White Ghost Extreme Venerable disappeared in the blink of an eye.

And the Dark Eagle Extreme Venerable was very angry, but he didn't dare to show it until the White Ghost Extreme Venerable was completely far away.

"Damn the White Ghost Extreme Venerable!"

This time, not only were several of his juniors captured by the White Ghost Jizun, but if this kind of thing happened, it was conceivable that other living beings would definitely leave Taiyi City and dare not stay here.

After all, it's insecure to stay here, who dares to stay here?

When the time comes, his Taiyi City will probably become an empty city.

"I have to go find Lord Tianyin Jizun!"

The Eagle is extremely respectful.

Lord Heavenly Seal Extreme Venerable is also an Immortal-level powerhouse, and his strength is even stronger than that of the White Ghost Extreme Venerable.

......

All the high-level Ultimate Realm Masters who were captured by the White Ghost Extreme Venerable were trapped in a void, and this void was taken into the palm of the palm of the White Ghost Extreme "Zero Six Zero" Venerable.

No matter how they attacked the barrier, they couldn't escape.

There is a huge gap between the Hao-level Ultimate Realm Lord and the Ancient Ultimate Realm Master, let alone the gap with the Ancient-level Ultimate Realm Master, it is simply a world of difference.

"It's over, it's the White Ghost Extreme Venerable who has captured us, this ancient Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord!"

A high-level Ultimate Realm Lord said in despair.

"What is this Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord doing to capture us?"

"It is said that these Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Masters all dream of breaking through to the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, and many countless Ultimate Epochs cannot break through, and they are all a little crazy, and they can do everything. "

"I was just passing by Taiyi City and resting for a while, but I was arrested, and I knew that I wouldn't stay in Taiyi City!"

When these high-level Ultimate Realm Masters were discussing, Ye Tian was very calm.

If he wanted to, he could kill himself now.

However, he was also a little curious about where the Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Master was going to arrest them, maybe this time it was not a crisis, but an opportunity!

After a long time.

The White Ghost Extreme Venerable brought many high-level Ultimate Realm Lords to an area like daylight, and only then did he release them.

"Don't try to carry you away, or I can kill you all easily!"

The White Ghost Extreme Zun threatened.

"Don't dare!"

Many of the Mighty Ultimate Realm Lords hurriedly said.

"You all enter this place, as long as you can get this thing, you can come out!"

The white ghost Jizun waved his hand, and the phantom of a treasure appeared.

Many Lords of the Ultimate Realm looked at it, only to see a piece of white metal floating in the phantom, but they didn't know what it was.

Then.

A high-level Ultimate Realm Lord asked, "Lord White Ghost Extreme Venerable, what kind of place is this, why do you let us weak Noble Ultimate Realm Masters go in? Wouldn't it be easier to find this treasure by letting some Ancient Rank Ultimate Realm Masters go in?"

The White Ghost Extreme Venerable explained: "This is the Land of the Ultimate Polar Day, and only the Ancient and Eternal Realm Lords who have comprehended the ultimate rules of the Extreme Day can enter, but the Land of the Ultimate Extreme Sun has not been around for too long, and no Ultimate Realm Lord has embarked on this path. In addition, you must only comprehend the ultimate rule of the polar day, and you can't contain other ultimate rules in your body, otherwise you will be rejected. Therefore, I can't get in, only you can go in. "

"Don't worry, as long as you find the Golden of the Aurora for me, I will let you go. "

However, these high-level Ultimate Realm Masters were still panicking.

The reputation of the White Ghost Jizun is not very good, who knows if he will let them go, but at the moment, there is no other way than to agree.

However, what exactly the use of the Aurora Gold was, they didn't know.

But they are definitely not the first batch of high-level Ultimate Realm Masters to be captured, and there must be other Ultimate Realm Masters who have been caught, but it is estimated that they are almost dead, and there are also high-level Ultimate Realm Masters who have brought out the Polar Sun Gold, which makes the White Ghost Ultimate Realm Lord eager to get more Extreme Sun Gold.

"Let's all go in!"

The White Ghost Jizun said.

Whoa!!!

One by one, the Mighty Ultimate Realm Masters had escaped into this Ultimate Extreme Sun Land, and they didn't dare not go in, if they didn't enter, they might be killed by the White Ghost Extreme Venerable.

An Eternal Ultimate Realm Lord like the White Ghost Extreme Venerable, except for being afraid of those Ultimate Extreme Venerables, is not afraid of any strong person, and if he can't beat it, he can run away.

......

As soon as he entered the Ultimate Polar Daylight Land, Ye Tian found that his body was penetrated by an inexplicable force, as if his entire power system had no secrets here.

"The Land of the Polar Day is weird, there's definitely danger here, and it's not your average danger!"

Ye Tian's dark road 0...

His copying talent shrouded all around, so that it was easy to sense the existence of some ultimate creatures, and if there were ultimate creatures near here, he would be the first to know.

Swish!

He continued to move on, but his goal was not to find the Golden of the Polar Day, but to see if there were any other opportunities, and he was desperate to obtain an opportunity that would help him to comprehend the ultimate rule, and if he could, he would be able to comprehend the ultimate rule.

Soon.

Ye Tian found some resources, but they seemed to be resources related to the Ultimate Dao of the Polar Day, and they should not be of much help to other Ultimate Systems.

Suddenly.

Within the scope of the copying talent, a white figure instantly killed, its speed was extremely fast, and it merged into the polar light of the polar dayland, almost imperceptible.

"Eternal Night Abyss Knife!"

Ye Tian immediately cast this ultimate killing move.

Bang!!!!!

Ye Tian's attack collided with the white figure, directly knocking it into the air.

"Spirit of the Aurora!"

This Aurora Spirit is the ultimate creature that embodies the ultimate body of the Aurora, and it should be the ultimate creature unique to the Land of the Ultimate Aurora.

Thundered!!!

Ye Tian and this Polar Sun Spirit Kill, although it could crush it, it was difficult to kill it.

In terms of strength, this Polar Sun Spirit is also a high-level combat power.

After killing 3.8 long ago, the Aurora Spirit still escaped.

After this Aurora Spirit left, Ye Tian tried to copy the copy body of the Aurora Spirit, and if he could copy it successfully, he could easily explore this Aurora Land.

"Copy!"

He vigorously urged the copying talent to slowly condense the body of the Polar Sun Spirit.

"It worked!"

Ye Tian was overjoyed.

However, he was unable to exert the strength of this Aurora Spirit Body, because he did not really grasp the Ultimate Body of Aurora and the power of this system, so he could not exert any strength.

But it didn't matter, he was only there to explore, not to fight.

"With such a replica body, I can definitely get the opportunity of this Polar Dayland!" Ye Tian muttered.
